name: TC-TXN-002 — Summary: Today
description:
Verifies the GET /summary?period=today endpoint.

**Endpoint:** GET /api/v1/transaction/summary
**Param:** period=today
**Expected:** HTTP 200 with non-empty summary body.

Validates the daily summary aggregation used on the RMS dashboard.
